parameters.query: SELECT * FROM public.users WHERE telegram_user_id = $1 LIMIT 1;

parameters.text: ✅ درخواست شما با موفقیت ثبت شد.  ⏳ حساب شما در انتظار بررسی و تایید مدیر است. پس از نهایی شدن، نتیجه برای شما ارسال می‌شود.

=👋 خوش آمدید

✅ شما به عنوان کارمند وارد سامانه شدید.
لطفاً یکی از گزینه‌های زیر را انتخاب کنید:
⏳ درخواست شما قبلاً ثبت شده است.  حساب شما هنوز در انتظار تایید مدیر قرار دارد.
❌ درخواست شما رد شده است.  برای پیگیری، لطفاً با پشتیبانی یا مدیر مربوطه تماس بگیرید.

parameters.query:
SELECT telegram_user_id
FROM public.users
WHERE access_level = 'admin' AND status = 'approved'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text:
=🔐 مرحله ۱ از ۲

لطفاً سطح دسترسی کاربر {{$json.target_user_id}} را انتخاب کنید:

=❌ درخواست شما توسط مدیر رد شد.

در صورت نیاز، برای پیگیری با پشتیبانی تماس بگیرید.

parameters.query:
UPDATE public.users
SET
  status = 'approved',
  access_level = $1,
  department = $2,
  approved_by = $3,
  approved_at = NOW()
WHERE telegram_user_id = $4;

parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM user_actions
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND status = 'active'
  AND action_type IN (
    'add_day_menu',
    'edit_day_menu',
    'status_employee_search'
  )
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO draft_week_menu (telegram_user_id, food1, food2, created_at)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, NOW());

parameters.text: ⏰ مهلت رزرو غذای فردا به پایان رسیده است.  لطفاً در بازه مجاز اقدام کنید.
📭 برای فردا هنوز منویی ثبت نشده است.

parameters.query:
SELECT id, week_start_date, day_of_week, food1, food2,food3
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week = $2
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text:
=🚫 عملیات لغو شد.

ویرایش منوی روز {{$json.value1 || $json.target_user_id || $json.food_day}} انجام نشد.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO user_actions (telegram_user_id, action_type, action_data, status, created_at)
VALUES (
  $1,
  'edit_day_menu',
  json_build_object(
    'week_start_date', $2,
    'day_of_week', $3
  ),
  'active',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

parameters.text:
=✏️ ویرایش منوی روز {{$json.food_day}}

لطفاً دو غذای جدید را با فرمت زیر ارسال کنید:

غذا ۱ - غذا ۲

مثال:
جوجه کباب - عدس‌پلو

parameters.query:
UPDATE week_menu
SET food1 = $1,
    food2 = $2,
    food3 = $3
WHERE week_start_date = $4
  AND day_of_week = $5
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO week_menu (week_start_date, day_of_week, food1, food2, food3)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
ON CONFLICT (week_start_date, day_of_week)
DO UPDATE SET
  food1 = EXCLUDED.food1,
  food2 = EXCLUDED.food2,
  food3 = EXCLUDED.food3
RETURNING *;

SELECT day_of_week, food1, food2, food3
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week IN ('شنبه','یکشنبه','دوشنبه','سه شنبه','چهارشنبه','پنج شنبه');

INSERT INTO reservations (
  telegram_user_id,
  day_of_week,
  food)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3
)
ON CONFLICT (telegram_user_id, day_of_week)
DO UPDATE SET
  food = EXCLUDED.food
RETURNING *;

SELECT telegram_user_id
FROM public.users
WHERE access_level = 'admin'
  AND status = 'approved'
ORDER BY id ASC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text }}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  r.id,
  r.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  r.week_start_date,
  r.day_of_week,
  r.food,
  r.portion_label,
  r.portion_qty,
  r.reserved_at
FROM reservations r
LEFT JOIN users u
  ON u.telegram_user_id::text = r.telegram_user_id::text
WHERE r.week_start_date = $1
ORDER BY
  CASE r.day_of_week
    WHEN 'شنبه' THEN 1
    WHEN 'یکشنبه' THEN 2
    WHEN 'دوشنبه' THEN 3
    WHEN 'سه شنبه' THEN 4
    WHEN 'چهارشنبه' THEN 5
    WHEN 'پنج شنبه' THEN 6
    ELSE 99
  END,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  r.reserved_at;

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text }}
📊 گزارش رزروها  لطفاً نوع گزارش موردنظر را انتخاب کنید:

parameters.query:
SELECT
  day_of_week,
  food,
  portion_label,
  COUNT(*) AS people_count,
  SUM(portion_qty) AS total_portion_qty
FROM reservations
WHERE week_start_date = $1
GROUP BY day_of_week, food, portion_label
ORDER BY
  CASE day_of_week
    WHEN 'شنبه' THEN 1
    WHEN 'یکشنبه' THEN 2
    WHEN 'دوشنبه' THEN 3
    WHEN 'سه شنبه' THEN 4
    WHEN 'چهارشنبه' THEN 5
    WHEN 'پنج شنبه' THEN 6
    ELSE 99
  END,
  food,
  portion_label;

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text }}

parameters.query:
SELECT day_of_week, food1, food2,food3, week_start_date
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
ORDER BY CASE day_of_week
  WHEN 'شنبه' THEN 1
  WHEN 'یکشنبه' THEN 2
  WHEN 'دوشنبه' THEN 3
  WHEN 'سه شنبه' THEN 4
  WHEN 'چهارشنبه' THEN 5
  WHEN 'پنج شنبه' THEN 6
END;

SELECT day_of_week, food, portion_label, week_start_date
FROM reservations
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND week_start_date = $2;

SELECT day_of_week, food1, food2,food3, week_start_date
FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week = $2
LIMIT 1;

SELECT day_of_week, food, week_start_date
FROM reservations
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND week_start_date = $2
  AND day_of_week = $3
LIMIT 1;

WITH selected_menu AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN $4 = 'f1' THEN food1
      WHEN $4 = 'f2' THEN food2
      WHEN $4 = 'f3' THEN food3
      ELSE NULL
    END AS selected_food
  FROM week_menu
  WHERE week_start_date = $2
    AND day_of_week = $3
  LIMIT 1
),
portion AS (
  SELECT
    $5::text AS portion_type,
    CASE $5
      WHEN 'full' THEN 'پرس کامل'
      WHEN 'half' THEN 'نیم پرس'
      WHEN 'khorak' THEN 'خوراک'
      ELSE 'پرس کامل'
    END AS portion_label,
    CASE $5
      WHEN 'full' THEN 1
      WHEN 'half' THEN 0.5
      WHEN 'khorak' THEN 1
      ELSE 1
    END::numeric AS portion_qty
)
INSERT INTO reservations (
  telegram_user_id,
  week_start_date,
  day_of_week,
  food,
  food_slot,
  portion_type,
  portion_label,
  portion_qty
)
SELECT
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  selected_menu.selected_food,
  $4,
  portion.portion_type,
  portion.portion_label,
  portion.portion_qty
FROM selected_menu, portion
WHERE selected_menu.selected_food IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (telegram_user_id, week_start_date, day_of_week)
DO UPDATE SET
  food = EXCLUDED.food,
  food_slot = EXCLUDED.food_slot,
  portion_type = EXCLUDED.portion_type,
  portion_label = EXCLUDED.portion_label,
  portion_qty = EXCLUDED.portion_qty,
  reserved_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  code,
  title,
  emoji,
  sort_order
FROM work_statuses
WHERE is_active = TRUE
  AND parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sort_order, id;

WITH valid_status AS (
  SELECT code
  FROM work_statuses
  WHERE code = $2
    AND is_active = TRUE
    AND is_selectable = TRUE
    AND parent_id IS NOT NULL
  LIMIT 1
)
INSERT INTO user_current_status (
  telegram_user_id,
  status_code,
  updated_at,
  updated_by
)
SELECT
  $1,
  valid_status.code,
  NOW(),
  $1
FROM valid_status
ON CONFLICT (telegram_user_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  status_code = EXCLUDED.status_code,
  updated_at = NOW(),
  updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by
RETURNING *;

INSERT INTO user_status_history (
  telegram_user_id,
  status_code,
  changed_at,
  changed_by
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  NOW(),
  $1
);

SELECT
  ws.code,
  ws.title,
  ws.emoji,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji
FROM work_statuses ws
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE ws.code = $1
LIMIT 1;

parameters.text: 📊 وضعیت پرسنل  لطفاً نوع مشاهده را انتخاب کنید:

parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  code,
  title,
  emoji,
  sort_order
FROM work_statuses
WHERE is_active = TRUE
  AND parent_id IS NULL
ORDER BY sort_order, id;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title,

  ws.title AS status_title,
  parent.title AS parent_status_title,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::text = u.telegram_user_id::text
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE u.department = $1
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $3
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 5 OFFSET $2;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE department = $1
  AND status = 'approved'
  AND telegram_user_id::text <> $2;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM user_current_status cs
JOIN users u
  ON u.telegram_user_id::bigint = cs.telegram_user_id::bigint
WHERE cs.status_code = $1
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  cs.status_code,
  ws.title AS status_title,
  ws.emoji AS status_emoji,
  parent.title AS parent_status_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_status_emoji,
  cs.updated_at
FROM user_current_status cs
JOIN users u
  ON u.telegram_user_id::bigint = cs.telegram_user_id::bigint
JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE cs.status_code = $1
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $3
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 5 OFFSET $2;

SELECT
  dt.code AS department,
  dt.title AS department_title,
  COUNT(u.id)::int AS users_count
FROM department_teams dt
LEFT JOIN users u
  ON u.department = dt.code
  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $1
WHERE dt.is_active = TRUE
GROUP BY dt.code, dt.title, dt.sort_order, dt.id
ORDER BY dt.sort_order, dt.id;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE department = $1
  AND status = 'approved';

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE department = $1
  AND status = 'approved'
  AND telegram_user_id::text <> $2;

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title,

  ws.title AS status_title,
  parent.title AS parent_status_title,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::text = u.telegram_user_id::text
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE u.telegram_user_id::text = $1
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
LIMIT 1;

parameters.query:
SELECT
  ws.code,
  ws.title,
  ws.emoji,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji
FROM user_current_status ucs
JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = ucs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE ucs.telegram_user_id = $1
LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total_count
FROM users
WHERE status = 'approved'

SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,
  ws.title AS status_title,
  ws.emoji AS status_emoji,
  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::bigint = u.telegram_user_id::bigint
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
WHERE u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 5 OFFSET $1;

FROM week_menu
WHERE week_start_date = $1
  AND day_of_week = $2
LIMIT 1;

  COALESCE(dt.title, u.department, '—') AS department_title,

  ws.title AS status_title,
  parent.title AS parent_status_title,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN department_teams dt
  ON dt.code = u.department
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::text = u.telegram_user_id::text
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code

  AND u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $3

nodes.name: Get Approved Users For Week Menu Publish

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO food_menu_notifications (
  week_start_date,
  sent_by,
  sent_at
)
VALUES ($1, $2, NOW())
ON CONFLICT (week_start_date)
DO NOTHING;

SELECT
  child.id,
  child.code,
  child.title,
  child.emoji,
  child.sort_order,
  parent.id AS parent_id,
  parent.code AS parent_code,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji,
  CASE
    WHEN ucs.status_code = child.code THEN TRUE
    ELSE FALSE
  END AS is_current
FROM work_statuses child
JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = child.parent_id
LEFT JOIN user_current_status ucs
  ON ucs.telegram_user_id::text = $2::text
WHERE child.is_active = TRUE
  AND child.is_selectable = TRUE
  AND child.parent_id = $1::int
ORDER BY child.sort_order, child.id;

SELECT
  child.id,
  child.code,
  child.title,
  child.emoji,
  child.sort_order,
  parent.id AS parent_id,
  parent.code AS parent_code,
  parent.title AS parent_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_emoji
FROM work_statuses child
JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = child.parent_id
WHERE child.is_active = TRUE
  AND child.is_selectable = TRUE
  AND child.parent_id = $1::int
ORDER BY child.sort_order, child.id;

parameters.text: 🔎 جستجوی همکار  نام، نام خانوادگی، یوزرنیم، واحد یا Telegram ID همکار را ارسال کنید.  مثال: سارا @sara فروش

=عبارت جستجو باید حداقل ۲ کاراکتر باشد.
لطفاً دوباره نام، یوزرنیم یا واحد همکار را ارسال کنید.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  u.telegram_user_id,
  u.first_name,
  u.last_name,
  u.username,
  u.department,

  ws.title AS status_title,
  ws.emoji AS status_emoji,

  parent.title AS parent_status_title,
  parent.emoji AS parent_status_emoji,

  cs.updated_at
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_current_status cs
  ON cs.telegram_user_id::bigint = u.telegram_user_id::bigint
LEFT JOIN work_statuses ws
  ON ws.code = cs.status_code
LEFT JOIN work_statuses parent
  ON parent.id = ws.parent_id
WHERE u.status = 'approved'
  AND u.telegram_user_id::text <> $2
  AND (
    COALESCE(u.first_name, '') ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR COALESCE(u.last_name, '') ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR COALESCE(u.username, '') ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR COALESCE(u.department, '') ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
    OR u.telegram_user_id::text ILIKE '%' || $1 || '%'
  )
ORDER BY u.first_name, u.last_name, u.id
LIMIT 10;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Normalize Employee Search Text').item.json.search }},{{ $('Normalize Employee Search Text').item.json.telegram_user_id }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE user_actions
SET status = 'done'
WHERE telegram_user_id = $1
  AND status = 'active'
  AND action_type = 'status_employee_search';

parameters.text: ={{ $json.text }}

main.node: Get Approved Users For Week Menu Publish
